checks.describe: the deep-dive judge-agreement probe needs host Ollama serving qwen3:0.6b (section 2). Self-seeds by pulling it if absent
checks.run: ollama list 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'qwen3:0.6b' || ollama pull qwen3:0.6b >/dev/null 2>&1; if ollama list 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'qwen3:0.6b'; then echo judge-ready; else echo judge-missing; fi

checks.describe: the judge-agreement probe grades the same borderline answer several times and reports a self-agreement figure (section 2). Needs only host Ollama
checks.run: OLLAMA_URL=http://localhost:11434 uv run --quiet labs/m5/judge_agreement.py --runs 4 2>/dev/null | grep -Ec 'self-agreement' | xargs -I{} sh -c 'if [ {} -ge 1 ]; then echo agreement-reported; else echo agreement-fail; fi'

checks.describe: the read-along CI gate preview workflow exists and runs BOTH eval layers on a PR (section 4)
checks.run: F=labs/opsmate/evals/ci-preview.yml; if [ -s "$F" ] && grep -q 'retrieval_check.py' "$F" && grep -q 'promptfoo' "$F" && grep -q 'pull_request' "$F"; then echo ci-preview-ok; else echo ci-preview-missing; fi

checks.describe: the gaming-resistant-set discipline is grounded in the golden set carrying a source per question — the traceability the rotation strategy relies on (section 3)
checks.run: F=labs/opsmate/evals/golden.yaml; S=$(grep -c 'source:' "$F"); I=$(grep -c 'id:' "$F"); if [ "$S" -ge "$I" ] 2>/dev/null && [ "$I" -ge 20 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo sources-traceable; else echo sources-thin; fi
